description_long: This is a minimalist, round stool with a flat, circular seat featuring six evenly spaced circular holes for ventilation or aesthetic design. The seat is supported by three slender, tubular metal legs that curve outward slightly for stability. The entire stool is finished in a matte black color, giving it a sleek and modern appearance suitable for urban environments. The legs are attached directly to the underside of the seat, with no visible crossbars or reinforcements. The stool lacks a backrest or footrest, emphasizing its simple and functional design. Its compact size and lightweight construction make it easy to move and ideal for public spaces such as parks, bus stops, or outdoor cafes.
description: A minimalist black metal stool with a round perforated seat and three slender legs, designed for urban public use. Its simple, modern form is both functional and visually sleek.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round seat with six holes and three evenly spaced legs.
description_view_1: Side view, similar to the front, highlighting the seat's flatness and the outward curve of the legs.
description_view_2: Another side view, nearly identical to the previous, emphasizing the symmetry of the legs and seat.
description_view_3: Rear view, mirroring the front, with all three legs and seat holes visible.
